title: Assembly Variant
description: Schema for a manufacturer- or system-specific variant of a base assembly

variant_id.description: Unique variant identifier; must begin with ASSEMBLY_ and extend the base ID

base_assembly.description: ID of the parent assembly object this variant derives from

modifications.description: List of layer-level or parameter-level changes relative to the base assembly

target.description: The layer order index or property path being modified (e.g. 'layer[2].material_family')

value.description: New value to apply; type depends on the target property

reason.description: Optional explanation for why the modification is made

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer or brand associated with this variant (e.g. 'Firestone', 'Carlisle', 'GAF')

system_type.description: Primary attachment/installation system classification for this variant

product_references.description: Manufacturer product names or spec section references

climate_applicability.description: ASHRAE climate zone codes where this variant is appropriate

notes.description: Any additional variant-level notes or restrictions
